body_html:
put in calendar

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

-----Original Message-----
From: Summer Claire Brennan [mailto:scb268@nyu.edu]
Sent: Wednesday, July 05, 2006 3:50 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: RE: Jeffrey's painting etc.

Hi Lesley,

I just got this. I am already in California! But I
will be back on the
12th. I'll send an email then.

best,
Summer

----- Original Message -----
From: Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com
Date: Thursday, June 29, 2006 10:13 am
Subject: RE: Jeffrey's painting etc.

HI again Summer. Jeffrey would like us to have
the painting picked up

and taken to him. Is there a time that is
conveniant for you? Also,
how large it the painting? (I want to make sure
the right vehicle is
driven)

Thanks.

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

-----Original Message-----
From: Summer Claire Brennan
[mailto:scb268@nyu.edu]
Sent: Thursday, June 29, 2006 8:59 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Jeffrey's painting etc.

Hi Lesley,

I hope all is well with you. I wanted to give
Jeffrey a message about
two things. The first is, this woman at a staffing
agency took the
liberty of looking up Jeffrey's office number to
call him as a
reference. I did not supply him as a reference and
would not have done

so without first speaking with him. She apologized
to me for doing
thatand I just wanted to let Jeffrey know not to
worry about calling
her or anything, and, as I said, I did not give
her the number or the
ok to call. Also, I wanted to know if he would
like his painting. I am

going to visit my family in california but will be
back on the 12th
and reallyhope that he would still like me to give
it to him. I put a
LOT of work into it and I feel so sorry that it
took so long. it's in
a very realistic style and I was working with a
concept that was
perhaps, in the end, too complicated, I bit off
more than I could
chew! Anyways

  • as
    I said I hope that all is well with you, Jeffrey,
    and the rest of the

office, and perhaps I'll be seeing you soon.

Best,
Summer
